revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''2-6-040

A vertical spar fixed in the ground or in the sea-bed or a river bed to show as a navigation mark.

[[Image:Ch2_Fig49.jpg|400px|border]]


Note: Sometimes called a Spindle or a Single-Pile Beacon in the U.S.A.

{{IALAFooter}}
